# Johann Fleischer

First mentioned: **3309-03-31**  
Last mentioned: **3309-04-25**  
Total mentions: **4**

## Related


## Biography

Johann Fleischer had barely settled into his role as chief executive of the mining corporation Caine-Massey when he was gunned down at a Federal Commerce Authority seminar at the Olympus Village Conference Centre on Mars in March 3309. Long-range plasma fire killed him instantly in front of an audience of Federal business leaders, and the shooter melted away undetected.

The weapon recovered at the scene — a professionally modified Manticore Executioner marksman rifle — was linked to undercover Imperial agents, along with advanced ECM equipment used to disrupt security systems. Caine-Massey publicly accused Senator Zemina Torval of ordering the hit, turning Fleischer's murder into a flashpoint for corporate-political warfare that would engulf the Tavgi system in open conflict.
